case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. JOHNNY MARTIN et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, JOHNNY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 742 MISSOURI STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANT TO PAY REMAINDER IN THE AMOUNT OF $221.00 BY OCT. 5, 2012 SEE SCANNED DOC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
